---
title: "coordinator.py"
path: "C:/Users/Craig/Corvus/CorvusStar/src/sentinel/coordinator.py"
loc: 53
complexity: 6
logic_score: 2.82
style_score: 3.60
intel_score: 4.42
overall_score: 4.06
---

## Intent
Python module facilitating MissionCoordinator, __init__.

## Interaction Protocol
Import MissionCoordinator and call its primary methods.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 2.8/10
- **Style [S]**: 3.6/10
- **Intel [I]**: 4.4/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 12 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
- [json](file://json)
- [pathlib](file://pathlib)
- [src.core.sovereign_hud](file://src.core.sovereign_hud)
- [uuid](file://uuid)

### Exports
- `MissionCoordinator`
- `__init__`
- `select_mission`
- `_legacy_sort`
